# Vessel commands: inspect and command aliases.

# Init (alias for orbiter init)
exec orbiter vessel init
stdout 'Installed 2 integration\(s\)'

# Inspect a known brand — shows integration state
exec orbiter vessel inspect git
stdout 'Integration: git'
stdout 'Status:'

# Inspect after quarantine shows quarantine state
exec orbiter quarantine git
exec orbiter vessel inspect git
stdout 'QUARANTINED'
stdout 'manual quarantine'

# Vessel unquarantine alias clears the quarantine
exec orbiter vessel unquarantine git
stdout 'quarantine removed'

exec orbiter vessel inspect git
! stdout 'QUARANTINED'

# Inspect an unknown brand exits without error (graceful — brand may be 3rd party)
exec orbiter vessel inspect unknown-brand
stdout 'not installed'
